Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've called you here so that I may offer you another form of assistance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now that you've been nurturing your powers throughout your exploration, I shall reveal to you more secrets of fusion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am certain that you will find this to be of great benefit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}New combinations have been added to Special Fusion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13016 0 0}I shall continue to observe as you progress further along your journey.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}That is all I'd like to say. Now, if you would, Elizabeth?[n]{f 1 1}
